Class UnEqualValueExpression<T extends Number>

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.expression.AbstractSimpleExpression<Boolean>

All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIValue<Boolean>, DRIExpression<Boolean>, DRISimpleExpression<Boolean>, Serializable
public class UnEqualValueExpression<T extends Number> extends AbstractValuesExpression<T>
